_comment: Manual overrides for assessment results. Each entry must have 'newStatus' and at least one of 'id' or 'guid'. Valid newStatus values: Implemented, PartiallyImplemented, NotImplemented, NotApplicable, ManualVerificationRequired, Unknown.

_examples.justification: Conditional Access policies enforced via federated IdP

_examples._note: Override by checklist GUID (more stable across checklist versions)
Override using both id and guid (guid takes priority for matching)
_examples.justification: Third-party policy management tool covers this requirement
